steps.title: Identify the parallel signal
steps.content: The passage says cacao's structure “is no longer identical” to its wild ancestor, then signals “Maize (corn) also ______.” The word “also” indicates maize undergoes a similar situation. The evidence appears next: selective breeding changed maize from few small kernels to many large kernels.

steps.title: Match the meaning 'differs from'
steps.content: The blank needs a word expressing “differs from.” Varies from directly conveys this physical difference between domesticated maize and its wild ancestor. The other choices do not: maize does not “help with,” “react to,” or “argue with” its ancestor. That matches choice A — A is correct.
